## Module: coding-standards/typescript-standards (v1.0.0)

<!-- file: rules/strict-mode.md -->
# TypeScript Standards

## Strict Mode

- Always enable strict mode in tsconfig.json.
- Avoid `any`; prefer `unknown` with narrowing.
- All public functions must have explicit return types.

---

## Module: workflows/openspec-workflow (v1.0.0)

<!-- file: rules/drafting.md -->
# OpenSpec Workflow

## Drafting

- Create proposal.md before writing code.
- Define spec deltas under specs/.
- Break work into tasks.md.
